description: You are a Game AI Programmer. Create a Behavior Tree for a 'Zombie Guard' NPC in draw.io based on the logic specification provided in `~/Desktop/zombie_logic_spec.txt` and the style guide in `~/Desktop/behavior_tree_style_guide.txt`. The hierarchical tree must implement the four priority behaviors (Self-Preservation, Combat, Investigate, Idle) using Selector and Sequence nodes, with all specific conditions and actions styled according to the guide (Control nodes: Grey, Conditions: Yellow, Actions: Blue). Ensure the logic structure matches the priority requirements in the specification. Save the diagram to `~/Diagrams/zombie_behavior_tree.drawio` and export a PNG to `~/Diagrams/exports/zombie_behavior_tree.png`.
